Action: Wallet completes initial issuance flow with DPoP binding key and obtains refresh token
Data:
- Credential offer deeplink
- DPoP binding key
- Initial access token and refresh token
- Initial credentials issued
Expected Result: Initial credentials and refresh token successfully obtained

Action: Wallet generates valid DPoP proof for token endpoint using refresh token and server-provided nonce
Data:
- Token endpoint URI
- Refresh token
- DPoP binding key
- Nonce from server
Expected Result: Valid DPoP proof created; first token refresh request sent and accepted

Action: Wallet successfully obtains new access token and refresh token from first refresh attempt
Data:
- Valid DPoP proof
- Refresh token
- Token endpoint
Expected Result: New access token and refresh token successfully returned with HTTP 200

Action: Wallet replays the same DPoP proof (identical nonce and jti) in a second token refresh request
Data:
- Replay DPoP proof (identical to first request)
- Refresh token
- Token endpoint request
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 401 with error code 'invalid_dpop_proof' and description 'Must use valid server provided nonce'
